title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.090 - Failure to give additional bond — penalty
text:
52.090.  Failure to give additional bond — penalty. — If such collector shall fail to give such additional bond and security for ten days after he shall be required to do so by law, his office of collector shall be vacant.
(RSMo 1939 § 11064) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9893; 1919 § 12885; 1909 § 11442
